Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction.AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement

  • Packages that use AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.mergerule.predicateabstraction  

    • Uses of AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement in de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction

      Subclasses of AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement in de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ConjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
      An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice based on the conjunction of predicates.
      class  DisjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
      An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice based on the disjunction of predicates.
      class  SimplePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
      An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice encapsulating exactly one abstraction predicate.
      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction that return AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
